title: BEM-732 trigger Claude runtime
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/autonomy','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 13:54 (UTC+3)'
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem732_trigger_claude_runtime_evidence.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-732 | TRIGGER CLAUDE RUNTIME EVIDENCE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: RUNTIME_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Claude, this is a trigger after runtime-evidence workflow patch BEM-731C.'+sep+sep+'Answer these two items:'+sep+'1. Why no previous mailbox response appeared?'+sep+'2. Final decision for multi-agent strategy v2.1: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+sep+'Write response to `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem732_claude_response.md`.'+sep+sep+'Required format:'+sep+'```'+sep+'BEM-732 | CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Why no previous response: ...'+sep+'Runtime/trigger status: ...'+sep+'Blocking reason: null / ...'+sep+'Required fix: ...'+sep+'Final recommendation: ...'+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
watch=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
try:
    data=json.loads(watch.read_text(errors='ignore')) if watch.exists() else {}
except:
    data={}
data.update({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v5','active':True,'run_id':'bem732_runtime_evidence_watchdog','interval_seconds':60,'until':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED','watch_scope':'BEM-732 BEM-728 BEM-725','operator_role':'none','kicked_at':created})
watch.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-732 CLAUDE RUNTIME EVIDENCE TRIGGERED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Wait for claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json and/or Claude response. Watchdog active.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'trigger_claude_with_runtime_evidence.v1','bem':'BEM-732','status':'gpt_to_claude_trigger_written_after_runtime_evidence_patch','mailbox_file':str(mail),'watchdog_active':str(watch),'operator_role':'none','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem732_trigger_claude_with_runtime_evidence.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem732_trigger_claude_with_runtime_evidence.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-732 | Trigger Claude With Runtime Evidence | SENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'New GPT-to-Claude trigger written after runtime-evidence workflow patch.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem732_trigger_claude_with_runtime_evidence','status':'gpt_to_claude_trigger_written','mailbox_file':str(mail),'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem732_trigger_claude_with_runtime_evidence.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-732 SENT: GPT-to-Claude runtime evidence trigger written.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(mail),str(watch),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created new GPT-to-Claude trigger after Claude inbound workflow runtime evidence patch and reactivated watchdog')
"""
